intro: Technology, cybersecurity, government, healthcare, and artificial intelligence sectors were the most affected in a global wave of attacks between April 12 and April 29, 2026, with China and the United States among the top regions targeted. Threat actors Claude Mythos and OpenClaw were observed exploiting critical vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) and CVE-2026-5752 (CVSS 9.3). The 50 articles in this archive cover a severity mix of 7 critical, 22 high, 6 medium, and 12 informational incidents.
